summary: Implemented an automatic background audio manager that creates/plays a looping chainsaw track at 0.6 volume on mount, falls back to a looping clown-laugh track if chainsaw autoplay fails, and attaches first-user-gesture listeners to retry playback when both autoplay attempts fail. However, the diff does not show removal of existing sound control/prompt UI, nor addition of the new clown-laugh static asset under public assets.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the user-facing sound on/off control and any "Enable sound" prompt UI from the site.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows changes to BackgroundAudioManager.tsx; it does not show any deletion/updates to whatever component(s) render the bottom-right sound toggle or top-right "Enable Sound" prompt card.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new static audio asset at /assets/audio/clown-laugh.mp3 (or equivalent under frontend/public/assets/audio) so it is reachable at that URL.
missing_requirements.reason: No new files were added in the diff, and no changes to a public/assets directory are shown, so the actual clown-laugh mp3 being served as a static asset is not evidenced.
